target_0.brief_supporting_logic: The building shows complete loss of roof and floor structures; walls are heavily breached with exposed internal framing; debris field covers entire footprint; structural integrity is non-existent per doctrinal definition of destroyed.

summary: One building assessed as DESTROYED with confirmed loss of roof and floor structures, walls heavily breached, and debris field covering the entire footprint. The scene depicts a single multi-story building reduced to skeletal remains with collapsed floors, exposed internal framing, and extensive rubble, indicating complete structural failure. The functional impact is total loss of the building's intended use, consistent with the prior assessment.
